home.title: KnowGate
home.subtitle: Open-source internal knowledge search & Q&A. Multilingual. Permission-aware.

auth.loginSubtitle: Choose a method to sign in
auth.magicLinkSent: Magic link sent. Check your inbox.
auth.noAccount: Don't have an account? Contact your admin.
auth.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Try again later.
auth.verifyMagicLinkFailed: This magic link is invalid or has expired.
auth.signOutConfirm: Are you sure you want to sign out?

query.placeholder: Ask a question about your team's knowledge...
query.noResult: I couldn't find any documents related to your question.
query.noResultHint: Try different keywords or ask your admin to add more documents to the system.
query.permissionDenied: There are {count} results, but you don't have permission to view them.
query.title: Ask a question
query.historyEmpty: You haven't asked any questions yet.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.welcomeEmpty: Welcome, {name}. Try asking a question to get started.
dashboard.hotTopicsEmpty: No questions yet. Popular topics will appear here.

sources.title: Sources
sources.subtitle: Connect Google Drive, Notion and other data sources to keep your knowledge base fresh.
sources.name: Name
sources.createIntro: Pick a source type and authenticate to start syncing documents.
sources.deleteConfirm: Delete this source? Existing documents will remain in the system.

users.title: Users
users.subtitle: Manage who can sign in and what they can do.
users.deleteConfirm: Delete {name}? They will no longer be able to sign in.

roles.title: Roles
roles.subtitle: Roles bundle permissions. The system ships with admin, editor, member.
roles.name: Name
roles.deleteConfirm: Delete role {name}? Users with this role will lose its permissions.
roles.inUseBlock: Cannot delete a role that is still assigned to users.

groups.title: Groups
groups.subtitle: Access groups decide which documents each user can see.
groups.name: Name
groups.inUseBlock: Cannot delete a group that still has members or document mappings.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: System-wide preferences. Some settings are read-only in this build.

audit.title: Audit log
audit.subtitle: Every administrative action is recorded here.

errors.E1: An internal error occurred. Please try again.
errors.E4: You don't have permission to do this.
errors.E6: The action conflicts with the current state.
errors.E7: Too many requests. Please slow down.
errors.E9: You don't have access to the matching documents.
errors.E11: An external service failed. Please try again.
errors.E12: The action is not allowed in the current state.
errors.E13: Your usage quota has been exceeded.
errors.E15: The request could not be processed.
errors.network: Cannot reach the server. Check your connection.
errors.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.

empty.tryAgain: Please try again or contact your admin if the problem persists.
